subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Eternity hath spoken from the Most Great Prison a word whereby the Concourse on High and the dwellers of the cities were enraptured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نطق لسان القدم فی السجن الاعظم بکلمه انجذبت عنها الملا الاعلی و سکان مدائن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @idle fancies; lust and passion, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
